content:
IVX IA CHAT — REMOVE RORK DEPENDENCY + FIX FINAL BLOCKER

Repo:
ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest

CURRENT BLOCKER:
GITHUB_PUSH failed with 401 Bad credentials.
Token shown by runtime is invalid/expired/revoked.
public-chat.ts fix exists locally but is NOT in GitHub and NOT in production.
Deploy commands are not working in production until this file is pushed and deployed.

MISSION:
Make IVX IA Chat independent from Rork and able to execute deployment/QA commands as a senior developer.

NO narrative.
NO placeholders.
NO fake verified.
Do the work or return the exact blocker.

STEP 1 — STOP USING BAD TOKEN
- Remove invalid token from active runtime binding.
- Do not retry github_pat_11ARYW7JQOCXGhuSOX3qwy.
- Test all available GitHub token variables.
- Select only a token that passes authenticated write test.

Return:
TOKEN_SOURCE:
TOKEN_AUTH_STATUS:
WRITE_TEST_HTTP:
ERROR:

Do NOT print secret values.

STEP 2 — PUSH FINAL CHAT FIX

Push these ready files:

- backend/api/public-chat.ts
- DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json
- any required route files

Required change:
public-chat.ts must route deployment and QA commands before normal AI answer generation.

Commands that must work in IVX IA Chat:

/deploy-status
/deploy-now
/deploy-evidence
/deploy-verify
/deploy-rollback
/qa-production
/qa-chat
/qa-members
/qa-landing
/qa-engagement
/commit-match
/github-status
/render-status
/supabase-audit
/watchdog

STEP 3 — DEPLOY

After push:
- wait for Render auto-deploy
- capture deploy ID
- verify production SHA changes from 939c9652 to new GitHub SHA

STEP 4 — VERIFY IVX IA CHAT INDEPENDENCE

Test in production chat:

1. Send normal message
2. Receive AI response
3. Message saves
4. Conversation reloads
5. Last conversation auto-opens
6. /deploy-status works
7. /qa-production works
8. /commit-match works
9. Watchdog reaches UI_UPDATED
10. No AI_TRIGGER_DECISION timeout

STEP 5 — FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

GITHUB_SHA:
COMMIT_URL:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
PUBLIC_CHAT_DEPLOYED:
DEPLOY_COMMANDS_WORKING:
QA_COMMANDS_WORKING:
CHAT_QA:
WATCHDOG_UI_UPDATED:
AI_TRIGGER_DECISION:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
VERIFIED
BLOCKED
FAILED
UNVERIFIED

If GitHub write still fails, return only:

FINAL_STATUS: BLOCKED
BLOCKER: GITHUB_TOKEN_INVALID_401
FIX_REQUIRED: Replace the active GitHub token in Rork/production runtime with a valid token that has Contents Read and Write access for ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest.
